remarks: Seaside transformation opportunity: Located in the heart of a sought after beach community, this classic ranch-style home is waiting for its next chapter. Located just a short walk to the shores of Long Island Sound. Enjoy Calf Pasture Beach, Shady Beach, waterfront dining, family activities or just a relaxing day on the sand. This property offers the ultimate "walk -to -beach" lifestyle. Weather your looking for a rewarding DIY project or a potential high yield investment. This prime location ranch home is located outside of the flood zone with amazing expansion potential. Here is your chance to build equity in a coveted neighborhood. Short distance to several parks,dining opportunities and East Norwalk Train Station
